Video.summary: Get a geographic overview of Eastern Europe, a region that spans 20 countries.
Video.title: The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity

Image.alt: The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity
The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity
The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity

Video.summary: Examine the many waves of people who settled Eastern Europe during the ancient and medieval worlds.
Video.title: Formative Migrations: Mongols to Germans

Image.alt: Formative Migrations: Mongols to Germans
Formative Migrations: Mongols to Germans
Formative Migrations: Mongols to Germans

Video.summary: Take a closer look at several decisive battles, including the Battle of Kosovo and the Battle of Tannenberg.
Video.title: Clashing Golden Ages, 1389 - 1772

Image.alt: Clashing Golden Ages, 1389 - 1772
Clashing Golden Ages, 1389 - 1772
Clashing Golden Ages, 1389 - 1772

Video.summary: The dissolution of the combined nation of Poland and Lithuania was one of the great crimes of the modern era.
Video.title: The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided

Image.alt: The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided
The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided
The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided

Video.summary: Consider the enormity of Russia's geography, desire for power, and its search for a cultural identity.
Video.title: A Russian Past, the Putin Future

Image.alt: A Russian Past, the Putin Future
A Russian Past, the Putin Future
A Russian Past, the Putin Future

Video.summary: Ivan the Terrible became a cultural and historical symbol of Russian leadership, but was he truly terrible?
Video.title: Ivan the Terrible's 500-Year Reign

Image.alt: Ivan the Terrible's 500-Year Reign
Ivan the Terrible's 500-Year Reign
Ivan the Terrible's 500-Year Reign

Video.summary: Assess how religion changed church institutions, as well as the influence of the Russian church.
Video.title: The Russian Orthodox Church

Image.alt: The Russian Orthodox Church
The Russian Orthodox Church
The Russian Orthodox Church

Video.summary: Peter the Great transformed a minor power on the periphery of Europe into a formidable empire.
Video.title: Peter the Great and a European Empire

Image.alt: Peter the Great and a European Empire
Peter the Great and a European Empire
Peter the Great and a European Empire

Video.summary: Begin your understanding of Europe as not only a place but as an evolving laboratory of ideas.
Video.title: The Idea and Place of Europe

Image.alt: The Idea and Place of Europe
The Idea and Place of Europe
The Idea and Place of Europe

Video.summary: Gain a firm foundation for understanding the medieval world with this introduction to feudalism.
Video.title: Feudalism and the Medieval World

Image.alt: Feudalism and the Medieval World
Feudalism and the Medieval World
Feudalism and the Medieval World

Video.summary: Plunge more deeply into the medieval world by grounding yourself in its three core components.
Video.title: The Three Orders of Medieval Society

Image.alt: The Three Orders of Medieval Society
The Three Orders of Medieval Society
The Three Orders of Medieval Society

Video.summary: Explore life on the manor and the transition from feudalism triggered by the emergence of money.
Video.title: The Manorial Economy

Image.alt: The Manorial Economy
The Manorial Economy
The Manorial Economy

Video.summary: Step back to Anglo-Saxon England to see what makes this period of history so captivating.
Video.grandparentTitle: England: From the Fall of Rome to the Norman Conquest
Video.title: Exploring How England Came to Be

Image.alt: Exploring How England Came to Be
Exploring How England Came to Be
Exploring How England Came to Be

Video.summary: Consider the role of Christianity, the state of language, and the collapsing economy during this time.
Video.grandparentTitle: England: From the Fall of Rome to the Norman Conquest
Video.title: The Rise and Fall of Roman Britain

Image.alt: The Rise and Fall of Roman Britain
The Rise and Fall of Roman Britain
The Rise and Fall of Roman Britain

Video.summary: See how DNA and archaeological evidence paints a complex picture of Germanic migrations.
Video.grandparentTitle: England: From the Fall of Rome to the Norman Conquest
Video.title: The Germanic Migrations to Britain

Image.alt: The Germanic Migrations to Britain
The Germanic Migrations to Britain
The Germanic Migrations to Britain

Video.summary: Was King Arthur a real person? What impact did he have on the history of Britain?
Video.grandparentTitle: England: From the Fall of Rome to the Norman Conquest
Video.title: The Britons Resist: The Legend of King Arthur

Image.alt: The Britons Resist: The Legend of King Arthur
The Britons Resist: The Legend of King Arthur
The Britons Resist: The Legend of King Arthur

Video.summary: Begin your study of federalism with a look at the 2000 presidential election dispute between George W. Bush and Al Gore. Examine the historical and philosophical foundations of federalism.
Video.title: Federalism: America's Great Innovation

Image.alt: Federalism: America's Great Innovation
Federalism: America's Great Innovation
Federalism: America's Great Innovation

Video.summary: Step back to the founding of America to explore the rise of our two-party political system. Professor Hoffmann walks you through six phases of party politics.
Video.title: How Federalism Shapes American Politics

Image.alt: How Federalism Shapes American Politics
How Federalism Shapes American Politics
How Federalism Shapes American Politics

Video.summary: Throughout American history, federal and state governments have clashed over interpretations of the law and states' rights. Survey this rocky relationship across time.
Video.title: States Can't Nullify Federal Law

Image.alt: States Can't Nullify Federal Law
States Can't Nullify Federal Law
States Can't Nullify Federal Law

Video.summary: Although federal law reigns supreme, the Constitution outlines a limited domain for federal authority. Here, you will learn about the federal power of taxing and spending.
Video.title: The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend

Image.alt: The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend
The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend
The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend

Video.summary: National defense is a key function of the government, but our Constitution creates a dual system to ensure a balanced federal government. Dive into this system and explore its implications.
Video.title: Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs

Image.alt: Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs
Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs
Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs

Video.summary: Shift your attention to immigration, which has been a complex issue for the United States ever since the 18th century. Explore the challenges of borders, immigration laws, and citizenship.
Video.title: Borders, Immigration, and Citizenship

Image.alt: Borders, Immigration, and Citizenship
Borders, Immigration, and Citizenship
Borders, Immigration, and Citizenship

Video.summary: In this first of two lectures, you will delve into the world of interstate commerce. You will see how the federal power has been curtailed and expanded in different eras.
Video.title: Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power

Image.alt: Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power
Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power
Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power

Video.summary: Continue your study of the Commerce Clause by looking at the boundaries of state authority and the impact on interstate economics. Also examine attempts to regulate internet content.
Video.title: Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power

Image.alt: Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power
Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power
Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power
